source.sourcePath: raw/sources/DHF (인허가)/라우터 (Archer C64)/4. EU-Type Examination Certificate/CE AOC RED_Archer C64.pdf

sourceSummary.oneLine: Bay Area Compliance Laboratories Corp. (Shenzhen) attests that TP-Link Archer C64 AC1200 MU-MIMO Wi-Fi Router samples were tested for CE regulations under RED 2014/53/EU.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports CE conformity documentation for the Archer C64 under the Radio Equipment Directive and listed harmonized standards.
keyPoints: Product is AC1200 MU-MIMO Wi-Fi Router, model Archer C64, trade mark tp-link.
The submitted samples were tested for CE regulations and in accordance with European Directives and Radio Equipment Directive 2014/53/EU.
The CE mark is permitted only after applicable requirements are met, including manufacturer issuance of a Declaration of Conformity.

entities.name: TP-Link Systems Inc.
entities.evidence: Manufacturer: Company name: TP-Link Systems Inc.

entities.name: Bay Area Compliance Laboratories Corp. (Shenzhen)
entities.evidence: Bay Area Compliance Laboratories Corp. (Shenzhen) hereby declares

entities.name: Nancy Wang
entities.evidence: Attestation by: RF Engineer: Nancy Wang

concepts.name: CE regulations
concepts.evidence: the submitted sample(s) of the above equipment has been tested for CE regulations

concepts.name: Declaration of Conformity
concepts.evidence: manufacturer’s issuance of a “Declaration of Conformity”

evidence.claim: The document is an Attestation of Conformity.
The manufacturer is TP-Link Systems Inc.
evidence.evidenceText: Manufacturer: Company name: TP-Link Systems Inc.

evidence.claim: The product is an AC1200 MU-MIMO Wi-Fi Router.
evidence.evidenceText: Product: Name: AC1200 MU-MIMO Wi-Fi Router

evidence.claim: The listed model is Archer C64.
The submitted samples were tested for CE regulations and European Directives.
evidence.evidenceText: hereby declares that the submitted sample(s) of the above equipment has been tested for CE regulations and in accordance with the European Directives

evidence.claim: The applicable directive is Radio Equipment Directive 2014/53/EU.
Radio standards include ETSI EN 300 328 V2.2.2 and ETSI EN 301 893 V2.1.1.
EMC standards include ETSI EN 301 489-1 V2.2.3 and ETSI EN 301 489-17 V3.3.1.
Safety standards include IEC 62368-1:2018 and EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11:2020.
evidence.evidenceText: RED Article 3.1(a) Safety IEC 62368-1:2018; EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11:2020

evidence.claim: Health standards include IEC 62311:2020 and EN 50665:2017.
The CE mark is permitted only after applicable requirements are met and manufacturer Declaration of Conformity is issued.
evidence.evidenceText: Mark is permitted only after all applicable requirements are met in accordance with the CE regulation requirements, including the manufacturer’s issuance of a “Declaration of Conformity.”

evidence.claim: The Declaration of Conformity is issued under the sole responsibility of the manufacturer.
evidence.evidenceText: The Declaration of Conformity is issued under the sole responsibility of the manufacturer.

reviewFlags.reason: OCR quality is low; many words are split or garbled, although core regulatory facts are readable.
No clearly labeled revision or version field is present; top text includes 'C2 (210115)' but its meaning is ambiguous.
Authority or jurisdiction is inferred from Radio Equipment Directive 2014/53/EU and European Directives; no issuing government authority is identified.
